response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role demands a Director-level IC Principal Engineer with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Resume shows roughly 10-13 years of professional post-degree experience, no demonstrated AI/ML product leadership, no advanced degree, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI platform strategy at the scale required.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack and infrastructure experience across web, mobile, embedded
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Lacks the recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products expected at Principal level
Experience level and seniority (Senior/Staff) below Director-level IC bar
No evidence of cloud/AI strategy advisory work with enterprise customers or partners

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Director-level IC requirement
